channel.title: Product - Terry Chen
channel.description: Hi, this is Terry. I'm documenting my product ideas and learning notes in this blog. I'm interested in creating new user experiences through generative ai, focusing on synthesized content generation and actionable insight extraction.

image.title: Terry Chen
image.description: Hi, this is Terry. I'm documenting my product ideas and learning notes in this blog. I'm interested in creating new user experiences through generative ai, focusing on synthesized content generation and actionable insight extraction.

item.title: Running a 1-Person Billion Dollar Company: The AI Stack That Makes It Possible
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: The complete toolkit for building a billion-dollar company with a team of one. How AI agents handle research, coding, operations, and marketing while you focus on vision.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Fine-Grained Social Listening for Understanding Crowd Conversations
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: A framework for turning fragmented, high-volume social discussion into weighted signal: what people actually mean, which patterns matter, and how teams should act.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Building Has Become Easier — How Do We Fix Distribution?
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: AI made shipping dramatically faster. The real bottleneck is now distribution: finding the right narrative, channel, and audience signal that turns products into adoption.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: The Agent Economy Starts with Tasks. It Scales Through Attention.
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Agents already execute workflows; the next shift is attention mediation. As discovery moves from humans to agents, distribution and advertising models must adapt to agent-operated demand.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Google Learn About - Interest Directed, AI Aided Learning
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Google's Learn About reframes both search and chat as an explore-first learning loop, lowering the cost of asking good questions while managing cognitive load with structured, clickable cards.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: From Indexing to Understanding Intent in Discovery Systems
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Discovery is moving from static data retrieval toward systems that understand why a user is searching, not just what they type. The next generation of search experiences must merge precise recall with adaptive reasoning.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: When Knowledge Becomes Fluid: How AI Transforms Learning
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Exploring how generative AI transforms static knowledge into dynamic, adaptive learning experiences. From fixed formats to fluid, contextual understanding that reshapes education and content consumption.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: PM for Agents: Turning Audience Insight Into Agent-Ready Specs
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: CrowdListen converts raw user conversation into structured product insight and agent-ready PM specs, preserving intent from feedback signal to executable task.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Iterating at the Pace of AI
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Two approaches to building agentic experiences: platform-first vs scenario-first. How AI coding tools enable faster prototyping and cross-functional collaboration for agent product development.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Human-Mediated Agentic Workflows
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Explore the emerging landscape of agentic workforces - autonomous AI agents that reason, plan, act, and learn to handle complex tasks and workflows. Analysis of key players, technology strategies, and market opportunities.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Search Advertisement
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Comprehensive analysis of AI-driven search advertising, market dynamics, and investment opportunities. Exploring how AI is revolutionizing ad targeting, optimization, and performance in the $200B+ search advertising market.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Content Platforms Will Become Distribution-by-Generation Systems
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: As generation costs collapse, distribution shifts from routing static content to generating the right content instance for each context. This post argues that future content platforms will distribute by generation, not retrieval.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: A Practical Guide to SEO with Claude
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Comprehensive SEO implementation guide covering technical foundations, on-page optimization, modern approaches, and practical tools for improving search engine visibility.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Interesting Reads
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Curated collection of compelling articles and insights on AI agents, entrepreneurship, and product development. Features analysis of breakthrough AI tools and emerging trends.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: User Needs & Opportunities
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Identifying real user pain points and business opportunities through conversations and online research. A collection of validated user needs that could become viable startups.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Smart Expense Tracker
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: The Smart Expense Tracker with Auto-Categorization is a cloud-native application built on AWS serverless architecture. The system automates the tedious process of expense tracking by leveraging AWS services to process receipts, categorize transactions, and provide financial insights. The application offers several key features including receipt scanning and data extraction using AWS Textract, automatic expense categorization with AI (using AWS Bedrock), comprehensive expense tracking, budget setting with automated alerts via SNS, and financial report generation in CSV or PDF formats.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Rapid Prototyping of LLM Enabled Webapps
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description:
PepTalk: AI Journaling Tool

Realtime conversation with aI companion to help you note down feelings and journals for the day. (Prototype: https://peptalk-navy.web.app/)

What2Do: AI Trip Planning Tool

A trip planning tool for generating itinearies based on article url input and content extraction. (Prototype: what2do-51224.web.app)

OHours: Office Hour Scheduling Tool

An office hour queuing system to improve student experience and help TAs manage questions more efficiently. (Prototype: ohours.web.app/)

Credits: Lian Zhang, Janna Lee, Soham Shah, Jonny Kong
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Deciding the Right Question Is More Important Than the Answer
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: When problems are ambiguous, the limiting factor is often not answer quality but question quality. This piece explores why framing better questions is the real leverage point in AI-assisted thinking and product work.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Why Context is Everything in AI Content Generation
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Why context is the critical factor in AI content quality - moving beyond single-prompt expectations to rich, contextual content generation that adapts to individual needs and cognitive patterns.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Essence of Creativity: Future of Creative Work
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Exploring the intersection of AI-generated content and human creativity. Analysis of creative workflows, multimodal interactions, and the future of content creation in the AI era.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Building AI That Actually Understands How Students Learn
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: How we built an LLM system that identifies student learning gaps and connects them with peers who've solved similar problems—scaling personalized mentorship through AI that understands the nuances of how people actually learn.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Multi-modal Creative Ad Generation
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Development of TikTok Symphony Assistant - an AI-powered creative tool for generating ad scripts and video content. Agentic workflows and interface optimization for automated creative generation.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Marrrket: AI Listing Secondhand Marketplace
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Marrrket is an AI-powered second-hand marketplace platform targeting North American university students, initially focusing on Chinese international students. The platform aims to solve the inefficiency in the current second-hand market by simplifying the listing process through AI-generated product descriptions from images and minimal user input. By reducing friction in the listing process, Marrrket will increase the overall volume of second-hand items available in the market, creating a more efficient marketplace for both buyers and sellers. The platform’s innovation centers on using artificial intelligence to dramatically lower the barrier to entry for sellers, which is hypothesized to be the primary constraint on market growth.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Cogno: Multi-agent AI for Sales Automation
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description:
Multi-agent system for cross boarder e-commerce sales automation. Co-founder and head of product. https://cognogpt.com

Cogno+ is dedicated to revolutionizing global e-commerce by empowering brands with AI-driven assistance that offers seamless, personalized customer experiences. Our mission is to serve as the digital bridge between brands and customers, enhancing interactions and transactions across international markets, and allowing the brand to increase conversion and upsell while reducing time and money spent on manual customer service.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Service Localization
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Technology built for one market rarely works in another without rethinking the product, not just the language.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen
